name: Local Light Shadows
author: automata-rtx
description: Real-geometry shadows cast by the game's local light sources (torch fires, bonfires, lanterns). The opaque world is re-rendered from the nearest active point light into a perspective light-space depth map (camera at the light) and composited over the scene, darkening surfaces the light cannot reach - modulated by distance attenuation and surface facing so shadows only appear where the light actually falls. First attempt: single nearest light, one frustum toward the player.
